title: NLU Delhi, Mentblue launch Certificate Course on Intellectual Property Rights: Law & Practice - Register Now!
description: India’s Intellectual Property (IP) economy has never been larger, and the gap between knowing IP law and practicing it has never mattered more. From trademark prosecution and copyright in the AI age, to patent enforcement, licensing and IP-led M&A, clients no longer pay for learning curves. Day-one readiness is expected.India’s best law schools teach the law brilliantly. Nobody was teaching the practice.To close that gap, National Law University, Delhi (NLU Delhi), through its Centre for Reg
